title: The ternary operator should be avoided
description: The ternary operator should not be usedAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode Smellbrain-overloadWhy is this an issue?Ternary expressions, while concise, can often lead to code that is difficult to read and understand, especially when they are nested or complex. Prioritizing readability fosters maintainability and reduces the likelihood of bugs. Therefore, they should be removed in favor of more explicit control structures, such asif/elsestatements, to improve the clarity and readability of the code.Code examplesNoncompliant code examplefunction foo(a) { var b = (a === 'A') ? 'is A' : 'is not A'; // Noncompliant // ..
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Avoid nested ternary operators - use if/else statements for better readability
Avoid complex ternary with function calls - use if/else statements for better readability
Avoid complex ternary expressions - use if/else statements for better readability
